info.name: DocuSeal Integration
info.summary: Integration with DocuSeal Enterprise for electronic signatures
info.description:
DocuSeal integration provides electronic signature capabilities directly from Nextcloud Files.
### Features - Request signatures on PDF files from Nextcloud users or external email addresses - Use DocuSeal templates or upload PDFs directly - Embedded signing within Nextcloud or via email - Track signature request status in the file sidebar - Automatic download of signed documents back to Nextcloud - Webhook-based real-time status updates - Nextcloud notification system integration
### Configuration 1. Go to **Settings → Connected accounts → DocuSeal** 2. Enter your DocuSeal server URL and API key 3. Start requesting signatures from the Files app
info.author: GEST CE
